response.justification: The candidate has extensive software engineering experience but lacks the specific hardware-software co-design, SoC/IP modeling, and AI accelerator performance optimization skills required for this role. Their background is primarily in web, backend, and full-stack development rather than cloud infrastructure hardware optimization.
strengths: Over 10 years of software development experience across multiple domains and languages.
Proven track record of building high-performance backend systems and microservices.
Meets the educational requirement with a BS in Computer Science and over 8 years of technical experience.
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC and IP modeling or hardware-software co-design.
Lacks expertise in AI/deep-learning workload performance analysis and optimization.
Missing preferred qualifications such as SIMD/MIMD architecture and GPU workload analysis.
